project.name: Bootstrap Agriculture Demo V2
project.description: Hypothesis-isolation bootstrap validation for contradiction-heavy agricultural text

goals.title: Validate bootstrap v2 hypothesis isolation on the agriculture contradiction case
goals.description: Run the same agriculture contradiction example again, but preserve competing interpretations as separate provisional hypotheses instead of collapsing them into one synthesis.

goals.title: Bootstrap map: Bootstrap project map
goals.description: Provisional bootstrap line inferred from 'agricultural-systems-contradictions.md'. Working problem: En distintos sistemas agrícolas del Noroeste Argentino, particularmente en cultivos extensivos como el maíz, se ha observado una variabilidad en los rendimient…

tasks.title: Plan v2 bootstrap isolation steps before implementation
tasks.description: Define the exact repeatable steps for a second-pass contradiction test: map, apply, inspect whether hypotheses remain separate, then close with testing conclusions.

tasks.title: Review bootstrap thread: Bootstrap project map
tasks.description: Validate the provisional bootstrap interpretation inferred from 'agricultural-systems-contradictions.md'. Review the inferred hypotheses and evidence before promoting any decision.

hypotheses.statement: The agriculture contradiction case can be re-run as a v2 experiment where bootstrap preserves multiple live interpretations if the provisional model isolates candidate hypotheses before synthesis.
hypotheses.rationale: The first demo already proved that CTX review can sustain multiple hypotheses after manual correction. The v2 test should determine whether that coexistence can be present from the start of the bootstrap flow.

hypotheses.statement: The v2 planning task should treat microbiota-first, microclimate-first, and complex-interaction interpretations as separate provisional hypotheses from the beginning of the experiment.
hypotheses.rationale: This makes the test measurable: if the line collapses back into one global synthesis, v2 failed its main design target.

hypotheses.statement: En distintos sistemas agrícolas del Noroeste Argentino, particularmente en cultivos extensivos como el maíz, se ha observado una variabilidad en los rendimient…
hypotheses.rationale: Bootstrap inference: Derived from high-signal source material during bootstrap mapping.

evidence.title: V1 contradiction demo motivates an isolation-first v2
evidence.summary: The first contradiction demo showed that CTX review can hold multiple interpretations after manual repair, so the next experiment should start by preserving them as separate provisional hypotheses rather than synthesizing them immediately.

evidence.title: V2 isolation hypothesis is grounded in the closed contradiction regression case
evidence.summary: The closed v1 contradiction demo already proved that multiple competing interpretations can coexist after manual CTX review. That directly supports the v2 hypothesis that the next bootstrap pass should preserve them earlier instead of synthesizing them away.

evidence.title: V2 success requires parallel provisional hypotheses
evidence.summary: The experiment is only meaningful if the same agriculture contradiction text is evaluated as at least three parallel interpretations from the start: microbiota-first, microclimate-first, and complex interaction. That gives the planning task a concrete pass/fail target.

evidence.title: V2 plan explicitly defines three parallel interpretations as the pass condition
evidence.summary: The v2 plan names microbiota-first, microclimate-first, and complex-interaction interpretations as separate provisional hypotheses that must remain alive after apply. That directly supports the task-linked v2 isolation hypothesis.

evidence.title: Supporting signal 1
evidence.summary: Sin embargo, esta hipótesis comenzó a debilitarse al observarse casos en los que una alta concentración de estos microorganismos no se traducía en mejores resu…

evidence.title: Supporting signal 2
evidence.summary: Al analizar de manera conjunta los datos de microbiota y microclima, se esperaba encontrar una explicación más robusta. Sin embargo, los resultados no mostraro…

evidence.title: Supporting signal 3
evidence.summary: Sin embargo, estas interpretaciones no son mutuamente excluyentes, y en algunos casos parecen entrar en conflicto directo. Por ejemplo, si la microbiota fuera…
